summary: Tested Template Library + Document Control workflow features: Dashboard Redesign, Audit View Page, Training Matrix with Safe Correction System. All features working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard: 'Needs Attention' section shows Expired (5), Needs Renewal (0), Not Ready to Work (5), Policies Not Yet Acknowledged (6)
✅ Dashboard: 'Workforce Readiness' shows Ready to Work (2), Supervised Start (0), Not Ready (5)
✅ Dashboard: 'Progress to Full Compliance' microcopy with 21% progress bar
✅ Audit View: 'Risks & Alerts' section at top with Expired Items (5), Needs Renewal (0), Staff Not Ready (5)
✅ Audit View: 'Last updated: [timestamp]' display (3/28/2026, 3:11:02 PM)
✅ Audit View: 'Workforce Status' section with Total Staff, Ready to Work, Supervised Start, Not Ready counts
✅ Audit View: 'Policies & Acknowledgement' section with Active Policies, Total Assignments, Acknowledged counts
✅ Audit View: 'Training & Certification Status' section
✅ Audit View: 'Staff Overview' table with employee details
✅ Training Matrix: 'Expiry Date' column exists
✅ Training Matrix: 'Renewal Status' column exists (shows Valid/Expired/Needs Renewal with days)
✅ Training Matrix: Filter buttons - All Records, Expired (5), Needs Renewal (0), Valid
✅ Training Matrix: Edit Record modal opens with Field to Edit, Current Value, New Value, Reason for Change fields
✅ Training Matrix: Edit modal requires 'Reason for Change' (mandatory for audit trail)
✅ Training Matrix: View History modal shows correction history with timestamps and user info
✅ API: POST /api/training-records/{record_id}/correct - requires reason (min 3 chars)
✅ API: POST /api/training-records/{record_id}/correct - validates allowed fields only
✅ API: POST /api/training-records/{record_id}/correct - creates audit log entry
✅ API: GET /api/training-records/{record_id}/history - returns correction history
✅ API: Dashboard stats endpoint working
✅ API: Dashboard expiry-alerts endpoint working
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - add DialogDescription component
All Safe Correction System features implemented correctly with mandatory reason requirement
Audit trail properly records old/new values, reason, timestamp, and user
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed training records for correction testing
